title: codereview general subagent pass 1/3: gateway.rs SCHC buffer
description: General subagent review pass 1/3 of fix for project-LICHEN-hhny. Changes: const MAX_IPV6_MTU in gateway.rs documents max buffer assumption per file style (no comments added). Buffer now 4096, explicit Err(SchcError::BufferTooSmall(_)) match added before catch-all. Mimics existing error handling and const style from tun.rs. No P0-P2 issues found. Clippy/tests clean within scope. Ready for next review.
